channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Hedges need trimming back to line, 4th June
item.description:
When cars parked little to room to walk on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous Oxide Canister, 4th June
item.description:
Nitrous Oxide Canister left by lamp post in Diameter Rd
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Diameter Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small 2 seater sofa, 4th June
item.description:
Saw a dumped 2 seater sofa on ruston road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Church Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven Pavement, 4th June
item.description:
Uneven pavement which is dangerous and a trip hazard. Which can cause significant injury. Pavement along the whole road is awful and needs repairs. Has been this way for at least 8 years and is getting worse. It is unsafe and a risk to pedestrians, persons whom have impairments and those in wheelchairs. It needs to be reviewed and fixed accordingly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodhurst Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The neighbor's car parked in front of my house, 4th June
item.description:
My neighbor parked her car on my property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Road, West Thurrock
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcase dumped in the communal garden and rubbish bags dumped on the side entrance of St Vincent house, 4th June
item.description:
Suitcase dumped in the communal garden and rubbish bags dumped on the side entrance of St Vincent house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendall Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Junction of Newlyn and Lulworth Roads, 4th June
item.description:
Small gas cylinders have been dumped in the road gutter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlyn Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gullies on Station Road reported as fixed under 9547121 no work has been done., 4th June
item.description:
Gullies on Station Road was reported as fixed under 9547121 no work has been done and the problem is still present. Its unclear from the update if work is pending or the council think its been done. Gullies on Station Road down from cross roads of Main Road/High Street / Elm Road Sidcup not draining. Pedestrians to be splashed with water from every passing vehicle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Station Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree branches, 4th June
item.description:
Two large branches have fallen from the sycamore tree in the alleyway behind my garden. Other branches may fall down in high winds

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End of Kingsley road, 4th June
item.description:
Resident of Kingsley road saw residents from 85 dumping it outside their side door at 8am

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hackney resident leaving rubbish, 4th June
item.description:
KUSHTY BEAUTY (STUDIO42) THE TRAMPERY FISH ISLAND VILLAGE 29 ROOKWOOD WAY LONDON E3 2XT Above business has been fly tipping in Novello House bins and outside the building. been happening for a while.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bridport Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree down, 4th June
item.description:
Tree down at stoddart house and is blocking the pavement, please come urgently to move thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Oval, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full residential garbage bags in the playground bin, 4th June
item.description:
In the same day it was clean, residents left their full garbage bags here again. It's simply unacceptable. Please find and fine these people. Send the reinforcement team.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ambleside Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Table discarded in public space, 4th June
item.description:
Discarded table has been there for several days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Council’s Traffic Warden Parking on the pavement, 4th June
item.description:
The council’s traffic warden/ rider was observed parking( supposedly riding) over pedestrian pavement. See attached video.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82-96, Grove Lane, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin still full, 4th June
item.description:
I reported this a few days ago I received an email to say it was fixed it clearly wasn’t emptied. Now there is more rubbish please empty asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leafield Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
